mapper.sql: id, merchant_id, channel_id, nick_name, account_number, uid, qrcode_type, qrcode_value, qrcode_url, account_remark, min_amount, max_amount, day_limit, count_limit, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT merchant_id,channel_id,b.user_name as merchant_name,c.channel_code,c.channel_name,count(1) as qrcodeNum FROM ct_merchant_qrcode a JOIN ct_merchant b on a.merchant_id = b.user_id JOIN ct_channel c on c.id = a.channel_id WHERE a.del_flag = 0
AND b.parent_path like concat(#{dto.parentPath},'%')
and b.user_name like concat('%',#{dto.merchantName},'%')
and a.channel_id = #{dto.channelId}
GROUP BY merchant_id,channel_id,b.user_name,c.channel_code,c.channel_name
